title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, February 14 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 14/02/2023
Image reference: 2023-02-14_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-february-14-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Panamax values have firmed
Capesize Thalassini Astrid (179,800 DWT, Mar 2014, Tianjin Xingang) sold to Tomini Shipping for USD 34.00 mil, VV Value USD 28.49 mil - Scrubber. Panamax Navios Libertas (75,500 DWT, Aug 2007, STX Offshore) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 13.80 mil, VV Value USD 14.08 mil - SS/DD Passed. Ultramax Springfield (63,700 DWT, Mar 2020, COSCO Shipping Heavy Industry Yangzhou) sold to Unknown USA for USD 30.75 mil, VV Value USD 26.20 mil - DD Due.
